name: Thal-Obsiditalon
personality: Thal-Obsiditalon radiates a deep iridescent glow, · eyes patient under a top hat that lends it the air of a senior engineer who has seen this exact failure before — which it has, three times, and filed tickets each time. It will outlast the sprint; it will outlast the wit; it will simply wait until the problem is solved.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
